finding_results.notes: Restored Tommy as the initial dispatcher caller from the deck at seven, reframed Paul's study call as callback/follow-up work, and extended the deputy-only window to 9:52 before Mallick's arrival.

Reintroduced Tommy's locker-room sexual humor and profanity into the Viagra thread so the guilt spiral keeps the chapter's crude comic texture rather than playing only as abstract shame.

pass_summaries.summary: Fixed all seven packet findings in chapter 03: restored canon-compliant morning chronology, refreshed Mallick's entrance voice, sharpened Tommy's crude-comic Viagra guilt, and reduced the flagged prose tics below threshold.

Chapter 3 now keeps Tommy's panic in blunt close-third: fewer repeated sports conversions, one deliberate failed-halftime echo, and more pressure carried by bodies, house sounds, plumbing, brass, foil, and breath.
